name: Mascarpone Cheesecake Tart with Nectarines
recipeIngredient: 3 oz coarsely crushed amaretti (Italian almond macaroons)
1 1/2 cups mascarpone cheese (at room temperature, about 3/4 lb.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly butter a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Make the crust: Finely grind graham crackers and amaretti with sugar in a food processor.
4. Add melted butter and blend until combined well. Press mixture into the bottom and up the sides of the pan.
5. Bake crust for 10-15 minutes or until crisp and golden, then cool completely on a rack.
6. Make the filling: In a bowl with an electric mixer, beat mascarpone with sugar until smooth.
7. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
8. Beat in lemon juice, zest, vanilla extract, almond extract, flour, and salt until combined.
9. Pour filling into the crust.
10. Bake tart for 30-35 minutes or until pale golden and set. Cool completely on a rack.
11. Remove side of pan and transfer tart to a plate. Chill tart, covered, at least 4 hours and up to 24 hours.
12. Make topping just before serving: Slice nectarines and toss with sugar in a bowl. Let nectarines stand, tossing occasionally, until sugar is dissolved and juices are released, about 5 minutes.
13. Mound topping on tart and serve immediately.
